recipe.title: Vanilla custard
recipe.description: An easy step-by-step recipe for proper custard from Jamie Oliver. Custard is the perfect accompaniment to loads of puds, but especially fruit crumble!

steps.descr: Halve the vanilla pod and scrape out the seeds
steps.instructions: Halve the vanilla pod and scrape out the seeds. Add both the pod and seeds to a pan on a medium-low heat, pour in the milk and bring just to the boil.

on_enter.say: Halve the vanilla pod and scrape out the seeds. Add both the pod and seeds to a pan on a medium-low heat, pour in the milk and bring just to the boil.

steps.descr: Remove from the heat and leave to cool slightly, then...
steps.instructions: Remove from the heat and leave to cool slightly, then pick out the vanilla pod.

on_enter.say: Remove from the heat and leave to cool slightly, then pick out the vanilla pod.

steps.descr: In a large mixing bowl, whisk the egg yolks with the...
steps.instructions: In a large mixing bowl, whisk the egg yolks with the sugar and cornflour until pale.

on_enter.say: In a large mixing bowl, whisk the egg yolks with the sugar and cornflour until pale.

steps.descr: Gradually add the warm milk, a ladle at a time, whisking...
steps.instructions: Gradually add the warm milk, a ladle at a time, whisking well before each addition.

on_enter.say: Gradually add the warm milk, a ladle at a time, whisking well before each addition.

steps.descr: Pour the mixture back into the pan and cook gently on a...
steps.instructions: Pour the mixture back into the pan and cook gently on a low heat for about 20 minutes or until thickened, whisking continuously. Delicious served with all kinds of crumble.

on_enter.say: Pour the mixture back into the pan and cook gently on a low heat for about 20 minutes or until thickened, whisking continuously. Delicious served with all kinds of crumble.
